creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
230 is 5 years old, 231 is 3 years old, 232 is 2 years old, 233 is 1 year old. In order to update x11/squeekboard to 1.9.3 I need to package feedbackd but it requires libgudev >= 232. Can you keep up-to-date in order to avoid blocking consumers (updates or new ports)?

https://download.gnome.org/sources/libgudev/
https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libgudev/-/tags
https://repology.org/project/libgudev/versions
https://source.puri.sm/Librem5/feedbackd/-/blob/master/meson.build#L18
